title: The Shoes of the Fisherman
writer: John Patrick, James Kennaway, Morris West
actors: Anthony Quinn, Laurence Olivier, Oskar Werner
plot: After spending decades in a Siberian Gulag labor camp, Roman Catholic priest Kiril Lakota is set free by Russian leader Piotr Ilyich Kamenev at the height of the Cold War.
awards: Nominated for 2 Oscars. 4 wins & 5 nominations total
